questions.question: Following assignments are not true

options.A: Division is assigned to Sales Organization
options.B: Sales office is assigned to Sales area
options.C: Sales person is the sales representative staff who belongs to the sales group
options.D: Sales group is assigned to Sales area

questions.question: The statement related to customer material info record is incorrect
